tasks.subject: Task 1: ScrapeResult dataclass + scraper.scrape_html migration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add ScrapeResult dataclass to scraper.py and migrate scrape_html to return it (with HTTP status code captured from page.goto).

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/services/scraper.py:263-441
- Create: apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_scraper_result.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/services/scraper.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_scraper_result.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr && pytest tests/test_scraper_result.py tests/test_scraper.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ScrapeResult dataclass defined", "scrape_html returns Optional[ScrapeResult]", "response.status captured", "existing tests pass"], "commits": ["cfe2c0a3"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add 6 env vars to config.py
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add INVALID_PAGE_DETECTION_ENABLED, HOMEPAGE_FALLBACK_ENABLED, SOFT_404_TITLE_THIN_THRESHOLD, SOFT_404_H1_THIN_THRESHOLD, INVALID_PAGE_TTL_HARD_S, INVALID_PAGE_TTL_SOFT_S to Settings.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/core/config.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr && python -c \"from app.core.config import settings; print(settings.INVALID_PAGE_DETECTION_ENABLED, settings.HOMEPAGE_FALLBACK_ENABLED, settings.SOFT_404_TITLE_THIN_THRESHOLD, settings.SOFT_404_H1_THIN_THRESHOLD, settings.INVALID_PAGE_TTL_HARD_S, settings.INVALID_PAGE_TTL_SOFT_S)\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["6 settings exposed", "defaults match spec", "env override works"], "commits": ["7e5963af"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Add Prometheus metrics
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add VALIDATION_VERDICTS (Counter, label=verdict) and HOMEPAGE_FALLBACK_TRIGGERED (Counter, label=outcome) to metrics.py.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/core/metrics.py"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr && python -c \"from app.core.metrics import VALIDATION_VERDICTS, HOMEPAGE_FALLBACK_TRIGGERED; VALIDATION_VERDICTS.labels(verdict='valid').inc(); HOMEPAGE_FALLBACK_TRIGGERED.labels(outcome='success').inc(); print('ok')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["VALIDATION_VERDICTS Counter", "HOMEPAGE_FALLBACK_TRIGGERED Counter", "importable"], "commits": ["69db964b"]}
```

tasks.subject: Final whole-impl review fixups (I2 + I3 + M4)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Address final whole-impl reviewer findings on the completed feature.

- I2 (IMPORTANT): routes.py homepage-fallback challenge-page rejection used `url=homepage` losing the original requested URL. Switched to `url=url`; analyzed_url still set to homepage.
- I3 (test): added regression test `TestHomepageFallbackChallengePage::test_soft_404_homepage_is_challenge_page` covering the previously uncovered branch.
- M4 (doc): CLAUDE.md `/detect-debug` row description corrected to reflect that the validator overrides result.ok / result.method / result.error when non-VALID, instead of "warning only — no flow change".

Deferred: I1 (defensive expansion of `_NEVER_CACHE_METHODS`) — orchestration always passes ttl_override for invalid verdicts, so the implicit discipline holds. M1 / M2 / M3 / M5 — low impact, would expand scope.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/app/api/routes.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/tests/test_routes_invalid_page.py", "apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr/CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/api-detection-langue-fr && pytest tests/test_routes_invalid_page.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["url=url preserved on homepage challenge rejection", "regression test for homepage challenge branch", "CLAUDE.md /detect-debug description corrected", "13/13 invalid_page tests pass"], "commits": ["8cd76d11"]}
```
